title: neottia microphylla
intro: Neottia microphylla, also known as the small adder's tongue orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to eastern North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Neottia microphylla include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and relieve respiratory problems. Neottia microphylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
